scripts.package:chrome: vite build && node -e "import{readFileSync as r,writeFileSync as w}from'node:fs';const f='dist/manifest.json',m=JSON.parse(r(f,'utf8'));delete m.browser_specific_settings;w(f,JSON.stringify(m,null,2)+'\n')" && cd dist && zip -r ../nostr-wot-chrome.zip . -x '.vite/*'
scripts.package:firefox: vite build --minify false && node -e "import{readFileSync as r,writeFileSync as w}from'node:fs';const f='dist/manifest.json',m=JSON.parse(r(f,'utf8'));m.background.scripts=[m.background.service_worker];delete m.background.service_worker;if(m.browser_specific_settings?.gecko)delete m.browser_specific_settings.gecko.data_collection_permissions;w(f,JSON.stringify(m,null,2)+'\n')" && cd dist && zip -r ../nostr-wot-firefox.zip . -x '.vite/*'
